name: Kronch'N'Roll
author: Poki
description: Get ready to crash and soar in Kronch'N'Roll - an exciting platforming adventure set in prehistoric times! There are 80 different levels accross many worlds for you to conquer, all set in beautiful hand-drawn graphics. Avoid falling from the platforms or crashing into dangerous spikes on your journey, as you need to position platforms and leap from vines to reach your goal. Can you help the little caveman navigate the dangers of the Stone Age? How do I play Kronch'N'Roll? Use the mouse to click on different menu buttons. Rotate Or Jump Left: A or the Left Arrow key Rotate Or Jump Right: D or the Right Arrow key Restart Level: R Who created Kronch'N'Roll? Kronch'N'Roll is created by Xaxaxa. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Kronch'N'Roll for free? You can play Kronch'N'Roll for free on Poki. Can I play Kronch'N'Roll on mobile devices and desktop? Kronch'N'Roll can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
